ddls:
CREATE TABLE "forms" (
  "form_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each form */,
  "form_name" TEXT /* Name of the form */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the form */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the form was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the form was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the form (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "input_fields" (
  "input_field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input field */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the form the input field belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the input field */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the input field */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the input field (e.g., string, boolean) */,
  "options" TEXT /* Options for the input field (e.g., dropdown options) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the input field */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Whether the input field is required */,
  "min_length" INTEGER /* Minimum length of the input field */,
  "max_length" INTEGER /* Maximum length of the input field */,
  "pattern" TEXT /* Pattern for the input field (e.g., email, phone number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_input_fields_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES forms ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "input_properties" (
  "input_property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input property */,
  "input_field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the input field the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., aria-label, error-text) */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property */,
  "aria_label" TEXT /* ARIA label for the input field */,
  "helper_text" TEXT /* Helper text for the input field */,
  "error_text" TEXT /* Error text for the input field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_input_properties_input_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("input_field_id") REFERENCES input_fields ("input_field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_rules" (
  "validation_rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "input_field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the input field the rule belongs to */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the rule (e.g., required, email) */,
  "rule_value" TEXT /* Value of the rule (e.g., true, false) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message for the rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_rules_input_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("input_field_id") REFERENCES input_fields ("input_field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_messages" (
  "error_message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error message */,
  "input_field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the input field the error message belongs to */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Text of the error message */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of the error message (e.g., validation, system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_messages_input_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("input_field_id") REFERENCES input_fields ("input_field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "form_submissions" (
  "form_submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each form submission */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the form the submission belongs to */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of the submission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the form */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("form_submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_submissions_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES forms ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "input_values" (
  "input_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input value */,
  "form_submission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the form submission the input value belongs to */,
  "input_field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the input field the value belongs to */,
  "input_value" TEXT /* Value of the input field */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Whether the input value is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_input_values_input_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("input_field_id") REFERENCES input_fields ("input_field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_input_values_form_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_submission_id") REFERENCES form_submissions ("form_submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "form_permissions" (
  "form_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each form permission */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the form */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission type (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("form_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_permissions_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES forms ("form_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "input_field_permissions" (
  "input_field_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input field permission */,
  "input_field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the input field */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission type (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_field_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_input_field_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_input_field_permissions_input_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("input_field_id") REFERENCES input_fields ("input_field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "form_submissions_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the form */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of the submission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "input_values" TEXT /* Input values for the submission */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for submission (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Type of browser used for submission (e.g., Chrome, Firefox) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_form_submissions_analytics_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES forms ("form_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "input_field_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "input_field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the input field */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of the submission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "input_values" TEXT /* Input values for the submission */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for submission (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Type of browser used for submission (e.g., Chrome, Firefox) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_input_field_analytics_input_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("input_field_id") REFERENCES input_fields ("input_field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "form_id" INTEGER /* ID of the form */,
  "input_field_id" INTEGER /* ID of the input field */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_input_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("input_field_id") REFERENCES input_fields ("input_field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_form_id FOREIGN KEY ("form_id") REFERENCES forms ("form_id")
)
